step_rationale: Peptidylarginine deiminase catalyzing histone citrullination and NET formation.
mechanism: Enzyme mediating neutrophil extracellular trap formation, amplifying plaque inflammation and thrombotic burden.

references.title: Costunolide Reduces DN Inflammatory Response and Renal Thrombosis by Inhibiting NET Formation.
Neutrophil Extracellular Traps (NETs) in health and disease.
